passages.title: 京都旅行
body: がよかったので、たくさん
passages.en: Last week I went on a trip to Kyoto with my friend. Early in the morning we took the Shinkansen from Tokyo Station. In Kyoto we saw three famous temples. The weather was good, so I took a lot of photos. For lunch we ate delicious Kyoto soba. At night we stayed at a Japanese inn. The people at the inn were very kind. The next day it was rainy, so we bought souvenirs and went home a little early. I want to go again in spring.

questions.q: How did the writer travel to Kyoto?
Why did the writer take a lot of photos?
choices: Because the friend asked for photos
Because the writer had a new camera

questions.q: Why did they go home early on the second day?

passages.title: コンビニのアルバイト
body: くのコンビニでアルバイトをしています。
passages.en: I work part-time at a convenience store near my university. I work three times a week, from 5 p.m. to 10 p.m. At the register I do things like receiving money and lining up goods on the shelves. At first, polite language (keigo) was difficult and I often made mistakes. But the store manager kindly taught me, so now I have gotten a little better. Sometimes, when customers from other countries come, I speak in English. With the money from my part-time job, I plan to buy a new computer.

questions.q: How many times a week does the writer work?
Who helped the writer get better at polite language?
What does the writer plan to buy with the money?

passages.title: 先生へのメール
body: っていただけませんか。
しいところすみませんが、よろしくお
passages.en: Dear Mr. Yamada, Good morning. This is Lin from class 3-2. Actually, I have had a fever since last night, and my head hurts too. My temperature is 38 degrees. I am going to the hospital this morning, so please let me be absent from school today. I want to take tomorrow's kanji test, so could you please send me today's homework and the test range by email? I am sorry to bother you when you are busy, but thank you very much. Lin

questions.q: Why is Lin going to be absent from school today?
choices: She has a fever and a headache

questions.q: What does Lin ask the teacher to send by email?
choices: Today's homework and the test range

questions.q: What does Lin want to do tomorrow?

passages.title: 私の趣味
body: いカメラをもらってから、
れたら、インターネットにのせます。
とてもうれしかったです。
passages.en: My hobby is taking photos. Two years ago I received an old camera from my father, and after that I came to like photography. On my days off, I take my camera and go out to parks and rivers. I especially like taking photos of flowers and birds. When I take a good photo, I post it on the internet. Last month, one of my photos took third place in a contest. I was very happy. In the future, I want to travel and take photos of beautiful scenery around the world.

questions.q: How did the writer become interested in photography?
choices: By receiving an old camera from their father
By joining a school photo club
By seeing photos on the internet

questions.q: What does the writer especially like to photograph?

choices: The writer bought a new camera
The writer started an internet site
The writer's photo took third place in a contest

passages.title: 夏祭りのお知らせ
body: やダンスのステージのほかに、
ることができませんから、バスか
passages.en: Notice about the Midori Town Summer Festival. On Saturday, August 5, from 4 p.m. to 9 p.m., a summer festival will be held at Midori Park. Besides a stage with songs and dance, there will also be many food stalls. From 7:30 p.m. there will be a fireworks show. You cannot come to the park by car, so please use the bus or the train. In case of rain, the festival will be held the next day, on Sunday. Everyone, please come!

questions.q: What time does the festival start?
How should visitors come to the park?
What happens if it rains on August 5?
choices: The festival moves inside a building
The festival is held the next day, Sunday
